label: Ad Request
description: Request payload for GetAds containing context keys for targeted ad serving.

fields.name: context_keys
fields.description: Category keywords from the current page (e.g. 'clothing', 'kitchen'). If empty, random ads are served.

label: Ad Response
description: Response containing a list of advertisements.

fields.name: ads
fields.description: Ads matching the context keys or randomly selected.

label: Ad
description: A single advertisement with a redirect URL and display text.

fields.name: redirect_url
fields.description: URL to redirect to when clicked (e.g. '/product/2ZYFJ3GM2N').

fields.name: text
fields.description: Short ad text (e.g. 'Hairdryer for sale. 50% off.').
